From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

2024 film by Terry McDonough

| Damaged | |

Jackson") * [Vincent Cassel](/wiki/Vincent_Cassel "Vincent Cassel") * [Gianni Capaldi](/wiki/Gianni_Capaldi "Gianni Capaldi") * [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock") * [John Hannah](/wiki/John_Hannah_(actor) "John Hannah (actor)") * [Kate Dickie](/wiki/Kate_Dickie "Kate Dickie") |

***Damaged*** is a 2024 [crime thriller film](/wiki/Crime_thriller_film "Crime thriller film") directed by [Terry McDonough](/wiki/Terry_McDonough "Terry McDonough") and starring [Samuel L. Jackson](/wiki/Samuel_L._Jackson "Samuel L. Jackson"), [Vincent Cassel](/wiki/Vincent_Cassel "Vincent Cassel") and [Gianni Capaldi](/wiki/Gianni_Capaldi "Gianni Capaldi"). [[2]](#cite_note-2) It follows Chicago-based detective Dan Lawson (Jackson) who investigates a string of serial killings in Scotland alongside another detective, Walker Bravo (Cassel). As the case continues, Lawson discovers a pattern similar to another killing spree he handled five years prior.

*Damaged* was released in select theaters, including [on demand](/wiki/Video_on_demand "Video on demand") and [digital](/wiki/Digital_distribution "Digital distribution") on April 12, 2024. The film received negative reviews from critics.

## Premise

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Damaged_(film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Premise")]

Chicago homicide detective Dan Lawson is called upon by Scottish authorities to assist in the investigation of a string of serial killings alongside another detective, Walker Bravo. Lawson discerns a pattern that connects with another killing spree he investigated five years prior.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Damaged_(film)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Samuel L. Jackson](/wiki/Samuel_L._Jackson "Samuel L. Jackson") as Det. Dan Lawson
* [Vincent Cassel](/wiki/Vincent_Cassel "Vincent Cassel") as Det. Walker Bravo
* [Gianni Capaldi](/wiki/Gianni_Capaldi "Gianni Capaldi") as Glen Boyd
* [Kate Dickie](/wiki/Kate_Dickie "Kate Dickie") as Laura Kessler
* [John Hannah](/wiki/John_Hannah_(actor) "John Hannah (actor)") as Colin McGregor
* [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock") as Marie Boyd
* [Brian McCardie](/wiki/Brian_McCardie "Brian McCardie") as Avery Thompson
* [Elaine C. Smith](/wiki/Elaine_C._Smith "Elaine C. Smith") as Elizabeth Walsh
* [Brian Pettifer](/wiki/Brian_Pettifer "Brian Pettifer") as Village Man
* [Mark Holden](/wiki/Mark_Holden_(actor) "Mark Holden (actor)") as Captain Ford

## Production

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Damaged_(film)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Production")]

In March 2023, it was announced that filming began in Scotland.[[3]](#cite_note-3) Filming wrapped in May 2023.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Release

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Damaged_(film)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Release")]

*Damaged* was released in select theaters and on demand and digital on April 12, 2024.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Damaged_(film)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Reception")]

On the [review aggregator](/wiki/Review_aggregator "Review aggregator") website [Rotten Tomatoes](/wiki/Rotten_Tomatoes "Rotten Tomatoes"), 27% of 22 critics' reviews are positive, with an average rating of 4.6/10.[[6]](#cite_note-Rotten_Tomatoes-6)
